# RMO Art

RMO Art is the official website for original artwork by Richard Oldfield.

Website: https://rmoart.co.uk/

Richard Oldfield creates original watercolours, urban sketches, oil and acrylic paintings, portraits, and greeting cards inspired by places, architecture, travel, landscapes, character, light and everyday observation.

## Key pages

- Home: https://rmoart.co.uk/
- About the artist: https://rmoart.co.uk/about.html
- Gallery: https://rmoart.co.uk/gallery.html
- Watercolours: https://rmoart.co.uk/watercolours.html
- Urban Sketching: https://rmoart.co.uk/urban-sketching.html
- Greeting Cards: https://rmoart.co.uk/greeting-cards.html
- Exhibitions: https://rmoart.co.uk/exhibitions.html
- Sales: https://rmoart.co.uk/sales.html

## Main collections

- Watercolours: original watercolour paintings including landscapes, seascapes, architecture, travel scenes and coastal subjects.
- Urban Sketching: sketches of buildings, streets, landmarks and travel locations in the UK and Europe.
- Greeting Cards: art cards featuring selected RMO Art paintings and designs.
- Oil & Acrylic: original oil and acrylic artwork.
- Portraits: portrait and character studies.

## Contact

Sales and enquiries are handled through the website sales page:

https://rmoart.co.uk/sales.html
